transforms.name: __load__
transforms.result:
<template>
  <Loading v-if="isLoading"/>
  <!-- Grafik RNFA -->
  <GraphicRnfa_Ebitda title="Grafik RNFA - EBITDA MARGIN" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik CAPEX - EAF -->
  <GraphicCapex_Eaf title="Grafik CAPEX - EAF" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik CAPEX - CF -->
  <GraphicCapex_Ncf title="Grafik CAPEX - NCF" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik CAPEX - EFOR -->
  <GraphicCapex_Efor title="Grafik CAPEX - EFOR" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik B+D Daya Terpasang -->
  <GraphicOpexBd title="Grafik OPEX B+D - Daya Terpasang" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik NPHR -->
  <GraphicOpexc_Nphr title="Grafik OPEX C - NPHR" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik Biaya Komponen A -->
  <GraphicComponentA title="Grafik Biaya Komponen A" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :items-daya="itemsDaya" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik Biaya Komponen B+D -->
  <GraphicComponentBD title="Grafik Biaya Komponen B + D" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :items-daya="itemsDaya" :year-range="yearRange"/>
  <!-- Grafik Biaya Komponen C -->
  <GraphicComponentC title="Grafik Biaya Komponen C" :items-pembangkit="itemsCategory" :items-daya="itemsDaya" :year-range="yearRange"/>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {ref, onMounted} from "vue";
import GrafikService from "@/services/grafik-service";
import Loading from "@/components/ui/LoadingSpinner.vue";
import GraphicCapex_Eaf from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicCapex_Eaf.vue";
import GraphicRnfa_Ebitda from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicRnfa_Ebitda.vue";
import GraphicCapex_Ncf from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicCapex_Ncf.vue";
import GraphicOpexBd from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicOpexBd.vue";
import GraphicOpexc_Nphr from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicOpexc_Nphr.vue";
import GraphicCapex_Efor from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicCapex_Efor.vue";
import GraphicComponentA from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicComponentA.vue";
import GraphicComponentBD from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicComponentBD.vue";
import GraphicComponentC from "@/views/Beranda/LamanAnalitik/TabPage/financial/GraphicComponentC.vue";

const grafikService = new GrafikService();
const isLoading = ref();
const itemsCategory = ref<{ id: string; name: string; power?: string }[]>([])
const itemsDaya = ref<{ id: string; daya: string; satuan: string }[]>([])
const yearRange = ref<number[]>([])

async function getCategory() {
  try {
    const response: any = await grafikService.getComboKategoriPembangkit()
    const res: any = await grafikService.getFilterDaya()
    console.log(res)
    if (response.success) {
      itemsCategory.value = []
      if (response.data.length > 0) {
        response.data.map((item: any) => {
          itemsCategory.value.push({
            id: item.jenis_kit,
            name: item.jenis_kit
          })
          if (item.dmn) {
            item.dmn.map((child: any) => {
              if (child.daya_mampu != "") itemsCategory.value.push({
                id: item.jenis_kit,
                name: `${item.jenis_kit} ${child.daya_mampu}`,
                power: child.daya_mampu
              })
            })
          }
        })

      }
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.log("Fetch items filter Kategori Error : " + e)
  }
}

async function getDaya() {
  try {
    const response: any = await grafikService.getFilterDaya()
    if (response.success) {
      if (response.data.length > 0) {
      itemsDaya.value = response.data
      }
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.log("Fetch items filter Daya Error : " + e)
  }
}

function getYearRange() {
  const now = new Date();
  const startYear = 1900;
  const endYear = now.getFullYear();
  yearRange.value = [startYear, endYear];
}

onMounted(() => {
  getYearRange()
  getCategory()
  getDaya()
});
</script>

transforms.name: vite:vue
vite:import-analysis
